Freshman.name: Algorithmic Problem Solving. Introduction to problem-solving concepts and program design.
College Algebra. Functions, graphs, equations, and inequalities.
Foundations of College Writing. Essay drafting and peer review.

Sophomore.name: Data Structures. Trees, lists, queues, hashing, sorting.
Software Engineering I. Methodologies for large-scale systems.

Freshman.name: Introduction to Nursing. History and ethics of patient care.
General Biology. Cellular and molecular functions.

Principles of Microeconomics. Supply, demand, and market structures.
